title: ingest_pdf_document_pipeline
description: Test the POST /ingest endpoint to verify processing a single PDF document through the full Bronze-Silver-Gold pipeline, including handling bilingual documents, correct metadata inference, section segmentation, and embedding generation. Validate successful response with document_id, sections_count, and status. Also test error handling for invalid PDF or missing parameters.

title: batch_document_processing_from_manifest
description: Test the POST /batch-ingest endpoint to process multiple documents defined in a YAML manifest with dependency ordering. Verify that the pipeline runs for each document and returns processed_count, failed_count, and per-document results. Also test error handling when manifest contains missing files or causes pipeline errors.

title: legislation_discovery_and_download
description: Test the POST /discover endpoint to discover and download legislation by act name or slug. Verify successful discovery returns discovered_count and manifest_entries with correct source URLs and saved paths. Also test handling of nonexistent acts returning 404 error.

title: semantic_search_over_gold_embeddings
description: Test the GET /search endpoint to perform FAISS-powered semantic similarity search over Gold-layer section embeddings. Verify that queries return top-K relevant sections with section_id, title, body, score, and document. Also test error handling when the index is not loaded returning 500 error.

title: knowledge_graph_building_from_manifest
description: Test the POST /build-kg endpoint to build and maintain a YAML-based regulatory knowledge graph from manifest relationships. Verify successful response includes nodes_count and edges_count. Also test error handling for corrupt manifests causing KG build errors.

title: data_validation_checks
description: Test the GET /validate endpoint to run validation checks on manifest integrity and Bronze/Silver/Gold schema compliance. Verify response includes valid boolean, errors array, and warnings array. Also test handling of validation service unavailability returning 500 error.

title: email_signup_submission
description: Test the POST /api/submit-email endpoint to submit emails for waitlist signup. Verify successful submission returns success true. Test validation error response for invalid email formats and server error handling.

title: web_scraping_regulatory_content
description: Test the POST /scrape endpoint to scrape regulatory content from configured sources like FINTRAC and OPC. Verify successful scraping returns pages_scraped count and list of files_saved. Also test error handling for unsupported sources returning scraping errors.
